description: MOVE alphanumeric '00123' to PIC 9(5) — numeric interpretation of digit string
notes: MOVE '00123' to PIC 9(5). On IBM, the alphanumeric string is moved to the numeric field zone-digit by zone-digit. The display value should be '00123'. The engine CobolDecimal.store should parse '00123' as 123 internally but display as '00123' with leading zeros per PIC 9(5).
